The app is really good and very easy to use I am 18 and I recently started doing SIP with my savings so this app has helped me a lot in taking my first steps into investing everything feels simple and beginner friendly which is very important for someone like me who is just starting out I also really like how smooth the interface is and how easily I can understand everything the UPI works perfectly and the cashback feature makes it even better also the wallet system is very convenient and useful

Horrible experience with INDmoney US stocks. - ₹8L debited March 26th is stuck with no refund yet. Plus lost opportunity on investments. - Funds that I managed to transfer have been processed only partially. The TAT jumped from March 30th to April 6th. - Misleading notifications claim money will arrive today but the app says otherwise. Unreliable systems with no predictability. Avoid if you value transparency and timely access to your capital.

Always 5 ⭐ ⭐ ⭐ ⭐ ⭐ 📌Fast trading and order execution. 📌Flash scalping feature's User interface is uniquely designed. No other apps provide it. 📌In a single click, I can change any call & put. 📌FnO Brokerage -10₹ per order(but you need to connect with customer support to get this discount. if the offer is available, they will activate it). I have saved more than 2500₹ in March 2026. Other trading apps are charging 20₹ per order which were eating my profits. 📌So, YES to INDMoney.

Been using INDmoney since 2024 and the evolution is wild. As a 23yo CS grad, I really appreciate how much smoother the UI and tracking have gotten lately. One big suggestion for the devs you guys should seriously look into SnapTrade. It’s a solid brokerage integration platform that would take tracking to the next level. I know you already have your own in-house setup for tracking external brokers, but integrating SnapTrade would help way more people sync their portfolios Smooth and glitch-free.
